note: Brand accent text on the page/card surface. audit-2026-05-12 claims 7.46:1 (blue.700 on white).
Danger accent text on the page/card surface. audit claims 6.27:1 (red.700 on white).
Success accent text on the page/card surface. audit claims 4.74:1 (green.700 on white).
Warning accent text on the page/card surface. audit claims 5.53:1 (amber.700 on white).
Info accent text on the page/card surface. audit claims 5.54:1 (cyan.700 on white).
Brand accent text (links, trend indicators) on the recessed page background behind cards — slightly tighter than on surface.base.
Danger accent text on the page background (surface.subtle).
Success accent text on the page background (surface.subtle) — tightest accent; green.700 on the off-white page bg.
Warning accent text on the page background (surface.subtle).
Info accent text on the page background (surface.subtle).
Headings / emphasized text on the page/card surface.
Default body text on the page/card surface.
Secondary/caption text on the page/card surface — carries a dark-mode override for AA.
Disabled text on the page/card surface. WCAG exempts inactive controls, but token $description claims 4.84:1 (gray.500) — validate the claim.
Headings on the recessed page background (surface.subtle).
Body text on the recessed page background (surface.subtle) — the dominant text-on-bg case for page content.
Secondary/caption text on the recessed page background (surface.subtle).

audit-2026-07-07 — reclassified AA-text → AA-large (3.0). Muted text on the muted/hover/alternating-row surface is supplementary (captions, helper labels on a transient hover/callout bg), not primary body text; text.muted is NOT darkened globally (that pair on surface.base stays AA-text and passes at 4.83:1). On surface.muted it is 4.40:1 light / 5.81:1 dark.
Primary text on always-dark chrome — Sidebar item label / footer name on .kp-sidebar--dark (surface.on-dark.base #18181B, invariant).
Default text on always-dark chrome — Header nav item / icon button on .kp-header--dark (surface.on-dark.base #18181B).
Secondary text on always-dark chrome — Sidebar toggle / section label on surface.on-dark.base.
Lowest-emphasis text on always-dark chrome — Header user role / chevron on surface.on-dark.base (white @ 0.6 alpha, composited).
Active nav-item label on always-dark chrome (Header/Sidebar dark). Token pins blue.400 #60A5FA in both themes; docstring claims ~7:1 on #18181B.
Nav-item / icon-button hover label (white) on the always-dark hover surface #27272A (surface.on-dark.muted).
Clickable icon-link glyph on the page/card surface — non-text UI, 3:1 (blue.600).
Step number inside the active step indicator circle (white on blue.600).
Step number inside the error step indicator circle (white on red.600).
Active step label text on the page/card surface.
Completed step label text on the page/card surface (gray.700).
Error step label text on the page/card surface (red.700).

Solid danger button label on its saturated fill (white on red.600).

Primary solid-alert title (white on blue.600). Title is 14-20px weight 500 — normal text, AA 4.5.
Primary solid-alert body text (blue.50 on blue.600).
Danger solid-alert title (white on red.600).
Danger solid-alert body text (red.50 on red.600).
Success solid-alert title (white on green.600). Unlike badge/accent success which use green.700, the solid alert bg is green.600 — verify white meets AA.
Success solid-alert body text (green.50 on green.600).
Warning solid-alert title (gray.900 on amber.500). amber.500 is a fixed pivot; gray.900 inverts in dark — verify both themes.
Warning solid-alert body text (amber.900 on amber.500).
Info solid-alert title (white on cyan.600). Unlike badge/accent info which use cyan.700, the solid alert bg is cyan.600 — verify white meets AA.
Info solid-alert body text (cyan.50 on cyan.600).
Neutral solid-alert title (white on gray.900; dark override gray.950 on gray.200).
Selected menu-item label on its tinted highlight (blue.700 on blue.50; dark override blue.900 on blue.50-dark).
Destructive menu-item label on the menu surface (red.600 on white).
Cell text in a selected table row (gray.900 on blue.100; dark override blue.50).
Cell text in a hovered table row (gray.900 on gray.100; dark override gray.200).
Table header label on the header background (gray.700 on gray.50).
Active nav-item label on its tinted background (blue.700 on blue.50; dark override blue.900).
Hovered nav-item label on its hover background (gray.900 on gray.100).
Selected tree-node label on its tinted background (blue.700 on blue.50; dark override blue.900).
Selected pagination page number (white on blue.600).
Selected segment label on the raised segment surface (gray.900 on white; dark override gray.300).
Unselected segment label on the segmented track (gray.600 on gray.100; dark gray.600 on gray.200).
Selected calendar day number (white on blue.600).
In-range calendar day number on the range highlight (blue.700 on blue.50). No dark override on either token — verify dark, where blue.50 becomes deep navy.
